problem id: f0007ca0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3)

examples:
  01010010 -> 10010010
  11100011 -> 00011111
  11110111 -> 10111111
  11000001 -> 00001110
  00000010 -> 00010000
  01000010 -> 00010010
  00110001 -> 10001001
  00011011 -> 11011000

query: 11011000
predicted answer: 11000110
